title: [Phase 1 / Task 1.1] Create ai_providers.py Skeleton
close_reason: Task 1.1 complete: ai_providers.py skeleton created. All public stubs present with type hints and docstrings. Import and py_compile verified.

title: AI-PROVIDER-001: Configurable AI Provider Layer
close_reason: Epic closed: Phase 1 / Task 1.1 skeleton delivered. Remaining phases tracked via dependent tasks.

title: [Phase 1 / Task 1.2] Implement Dataclasses
close_reason: Task 1.2 complete: ProviderDescriptor, ProviderProfile, ConfigureOptions dataclasses fully implemented with default values and doctests. ProviderDescriptor.base_url=None, requires_api_key=True defaults added. ProviderProfile.model=None, base_url=None defaults added. All three instantiation tests pass. __all__ export list added.

title: [Phase 2 / Task 2.1] Register configure Subparser in generate_documentation.py
close_reason: Task 2.1 complete: configure subparser registered in generate_documentation.py with all 7 flags (--list-providers, --list-profiles, --list-profiles-for-provider, --create-profile, --edit-profile, --delete-profile, --activate-profile). python generate_documentation.py configure -h prints help without error. Early-return dispatch calls configure_command(). No breaking changes to existing flags.

Task 1.3 complete: ensure_providers() fully implemented in ai_providers.py. Idempotent (_initialized guard). Loads .env via python-dotenv when present; logs warning (never raises) when .env is missing. Populates _api_key_store with all *_API_KEY env vars. _reset_for_tests() helper added for unit-test isolation. All smoke-test assertions pass.
title: [Phase 1 / Task 1.3] Implement ensure_providers() and .env Bootstrap
[Phase 1 / Task 1.4] Implement resolve_active_provider() and get_active_profile()
close_reason: Task 1.4 complete: resolve_active_provider() reads AI_ACTIVE_PROVIDER, returns ProviderDescriptor, raises ProviderNotConfiguredError if unset or unregistered. get_active_profile() reads AI_ACTIVE_PROFILE and <PREFIX>_API_KEY, returns ProviderProfile with raw key, raises ProfileNotFoundError if unset or key missing. Both call ensure_providers() internally. All smoke tests pass.

title: [Phase 3 / Task 3.1] Implement register_provider() Public API
close_reason: Task 3.1 complete: register_provider() implemented in ai_providers.py. Adds descriptor to _provider_registry; raises ProviderAlreadyRegisteredError on duplicate (force=True overrides). All smoke tests pass.
